assertions.reason: Arrow control matches expected dimensions and overlap styling.
evidence: computed: width=40px, height=40px, border-radius=12px, border-top=4px solid rgb(19, 19, 19), margin-top=-18px

assertions.reason: CTA button min-height and radius match, but typography does not: font-size is 16px (expected 17px) and font-weight is 400 (expected medium).
evidence: computed: text='Connect Wallet', min-height=56px, border-radius=20px, font-size=16px, font-weight=400

assertions.reason: Segmented swap tabs are present and active/inactive styling is distinct.
evidence: computed: tabs present=['swap','limit']; active 'swap' has highlighted child background rgba(255,255,255,0.08); inactive 'limit' text color rgba(255,255,255,0.65)

assertions.reason: Token selector pills are fully rounded as required.
evidence: computed: USD1 pill border-radius=999999px; CASH pill border-radius=999999px
